JUDGE DESMOND, K.LEE/CLERK, P.DOWLING/CSR 09:35AM CAUSE CALLED FOR TRIAL BY COURT. THE PLTF, BRUCE CURHAN, IS PRESENT IN PRO PER. DAVID GRAPPO FOR THE DEFT, UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, INC. WITNESS S&E AND EXHIBITS ARE IDENTIFIED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE. COURT TAKES MATTER UNDER SUBMISSION.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAKE NOTHING FROM DEFENDANT UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, INC. ON THE COMPLAINT, SAID DEFENDANT TO HAVE JUDGMENT THEREON FOR $351.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $351.40, DEFENDANT TO RECOVER COSTS OF SUIT.
MEMORANDUM OF COSTS AND DISBURSEMENTS, $351.40 TOTAL COSTS, MATURE DATE JUN-03-1998, FILED BY DEFENDANT UNION BANK OF CALIFORNIA, INC.
